overview.description: The Invesco Variable Rate Preferred ETF (VRP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of variable- and floating-rate preferred stocks. VRP was launched on May 1, 2014 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: ICE BofA Variable Rate Preferred & Hybrid Securities
